routing_hints.non_use_boundary: Do not use this fixture for positive suite, release, package, or broad automation claims.
routing_hints.conflict_rule: Use only fixture-local files in this suite directory.

evidence_expectations: Checked children require member reports with direct evidence entries.
An empty member report cannot satisfy suite closure.
maintenance_ownership: Fixture maintainers refresh this suite map when child closure rules change.
residual_risk: This suite map covers only the missing-direct-evidence negative branch.
claim_boundary: This suite map covers only the bad_suite_child_without_closure negative fixture records and member reference. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
